message:
feat(a11y): Add accessibility improvements to SwipeablePromptCard

- Add role="dialog", aria-modal, and aria-labelledby to quick actions menu
- Add aria-label to all interactive buttons with descriptive context
- Add aria-hidden to decorative elements (backdrop, separator)
- Add focus trap to quick actions menu for keyboard navigation
- Add role="group" to button container for screen reader grouping

This improves WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for the mobile quick actions menu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
